message: Update maintainer audit schedule to noon Eastern (17:00 UTC)

files.patch:
@@ -3,9 +3,8 @@ name: Run All Maintainer Audits
 on:
   workflow_dispatch:
   schedule:
-    # Run every Monday at 9:00 AM Eastern (14:00 UTC in winter, 13:00 UTC in summer)
-    # Using 14:00 UTC (9 AM EST during winter months)
-    - cron: '0 14 * * 1'
+    # Run every Monday at 12:00 PM Eastern (17:00 UTC)
+    - cron: '0 17 * * 1'
 
 permissions:
   actions: write
